name: Migration path MCP deployments to GAX
current_usage_summary: Migration is incremental wrapping, not rip-and-replace. Organizations with production MCP servers preserve OAuth investments and HTTP endpoints; GAX adds gaxd as policy/audit/projection layer. Model-facing interface shrinks to gax CLI or thin MCP meta-server. Dual-run period: same backend handler serves MCP tools/call and GAX /invoke via adapter map.
typical_stack: Existing: remote MCP on ACA/K8s. Target: gaxd + manifest repo + optional thin MCP bridge for Claude/Cursor. Tools: manifest generator from MCP tool schemas; integration tests comparing envelope outputs.
auth_and_identity_model: Import OAuth tokens from MCP client vault into gaxd tenant vault. Caps derived from former tool scopes—map tools/list scopes to command allowlists. Session: user SSO → gax auth login → cap-mint with commands mirroring previously enabled MCP tools.
context_and_token_behavior: Immediate win: remove tools/list from agent context; only gax help line in rules. MCP bridge exposes 3 meta-tools vs 40—same as Code Mode migration path.
operational_pain_points: Maintaining dual interfaces during migration. Schema drift between MCP tool JSON Schema and GAX manifest. Versioning command@1.0.0 vs MCP tool name changes.
developer_experience_friction: ISV must publish manifests; consumers update skills. Testing matrix doubles temporarily.
gax_mapping: Direct: each MCP tool → manifest command + mcp adapter. Intent-grouped MCP tools map 1:1. Code Mode MCP → native gax search/execute over registry.
migration_phases: Phase 0 inventory: tools/list export, token cost measure. Phase 1 shadow invoke: gaxd calls MCP, log diff. Phase 2 pilot team: mcp.json only gax-bridge. Phase 3 policy: caps per role. Phase 4 decommission direct MCP URLs from clients. Phase 5 ACSP spec publication for native host support (optional long-term).
adapter_or_bridge_strategy: mcp_bridge adapter in gaxd: spawns or HTTP to existing server, translates invoke. Auto-manifest from MCP schema JSON (roadmap). For stdio servers, gaxd manages subprocess pool—replaces IDE spawning N processes.
breaking_changes_and_mitigations: MCP Apps/elicitation: keep legacy MCP channel for UI until GAX extension. Custom clients hardcoding tool names: alias registry. OAuth client IDs may change when token custody moves to gaxd—document re-consent.
infrastructure_changes: Deploy gaxd; network allow MCP localhost only from gaxd; rotate secrets into vault. CI validates manifests on PR.
deployment_topology: gaxd colocated in same K8s namespace as MCP server initially; later gaxd centralizes multiple MCP backends.
adoption_drivers: CISO mandate for per-action audit; platform team reduces MCP server count exposed to clients.
adoption_blockers: Anthropic directory visibility tied to MCP not GAX. Sunk cost in MCP Apps UX.
adoption_timeline_estimate: Technical dual-run: 3–6 months per integrator; org-wide cutover 12–24 months.
historical_parallel: gRPC gateway in front of REST microservices during service mesh adoption.
